scripts.test:api:report: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('postman/reports', { recursive: true })" && newman run postman/collections/api-automation.collection.json -e postman/Environments/qa.environment.json -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export postman/reports/newman-report.html
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:api:report
